nasb.text: But the wicked will be cut off from the land And the treacherous will be uprooted from it.

esv.text: but the wicked will be cut off from the land, and the treacherous will be rooted out of it.

cnv.text: 但惡人必從地上除滅， 行事奸詐的必從世上拔除。

ccb.text: 恶人必遭灭绝， 奸徒必被铲除。

csbs.text: 而恶人将从地上被剪除， 背信者将从地上被拔出。
